title: describe.request
description: Request to produce a descriptive explanation of an input object, resource, or concept (e.g., explain what this thing is and how it behaves).

subject.description: The thing to describe (name, identifier, or short text).

context.description: Optional additional context (e.g., where this subject appears).

audience.description: Intended audience (e.g., novice, expert, legal, product-manager).
